creator: tj+freebsd_bugs@a13.fr
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #7)
> Sorry this took so long, it wasn't assigned as I would have expected, so I
> didn't see it. Anyway, committed now, thanks! And the next one won't take so
> long, if you're still interested.

No problem, thank you a lot for the commit!

Should I assign next similar reports directly to your mail address? Or
`ruby@FreeBSD.org' maybe?

I'm still highly interested for submitting next ports! However, I
initially mentioned one dependency for the port I intend to submit at
the end, but there is now two. So plan would be to submit a new port
addition (a simple ruby gem), and then the last one.
